message:
feat: add memory optimization flags to reduce Chrome RAM usage

- --renderer-process-limit=1: Force single renderer process
- --disable-site-isolation-trials: Disable site isolation (safe for single page)
- --disable-features=site-per-process: Hard-disable site isolation
- --no-zygote: Disable zygote process (not needed for single tab)
- Remove --disable-dev-shm-usage from disable-gpu section
